summary: Comprehensive testing of Network Scanner and Mobile Agent features. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with Setup Scanner tab showing download buttons and setup instructions, Devices tab showing 17 discovered devices with correct device types.
passed_tests: POST /api/swarm/scanner/report - Accepts device reports from network scanners (public endpoint, no auth required)
POST /api/swarm/scanner/report - Accepts multiple device types (Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, Android, IoT)
GET /api/swarm/agent/download/scanner - Returns seraph_network_scanner.py script
GET /api/swarm/agent/download/mobile - Returns seraph_mobile_agent.py script
GET /api/swarm/agent/download/linux - Returns seraph_defender.py agent
GET /api/swarm/agent/download/windows - Returns seraph_defender.py agent
GET /api/swarm/agent/download/macos - Returns seraph_defender.py agent
GET /api/swarm/devices - Returns 17 discovered devices with stats
GET /api/swarm/devices - Devices have correct fields (ip_address, os_type, device_type)
GET /api/swarm/devices - Stats include breakdown by OS type
GET /api/swarm/devices - Deployable flag correct for Windows/macOS/Linux workstations
GET /api/swarm/devices - Mobile manageable flag correct for iOS/Android devices
GET /api/swarm/overview - Returns correct device count (17 total)
GET /api/swarm/overview - Has all required sections (devices, agents, telemetry, deployments)
GET /api/swarm/scanners - Returns list of registered scanners
GET /api/swarm/scanners - Scanners have required fields (scanner_id, network, last_report)
Device type identification - Windows devices identified
Device type identification - Linux devices identified
Device type identification - iOS devices identified
Device type identification - Android devices identified
Device type identification - IoT devices identified

features: Network Scanner Setup card with download button
Step 2: Install Dependencies - pip install python-nmap paramiko requests
Step 3: Run Scanner - with API URL and interval options
Mobile Agent Setup card with download button
Desktop Agent Downloads - Linux, Windows, macOS buttons
Device list with IP, hostname, OS type, device type
Risk score displayed for each device
Device types: Windows workstation, Linux server, iOS mobile, Android mobile, IoT

critical_code_review_comments: Scanner report endpoint correctly accepts device reports without authentication (public endpoint for LAN scanners)
Agent download endpoints return correct Python scripts for scanner, mobile, and desktop agents
Device types correctly identified with deployable/mobile_manageable flags
Network scanner script includes comprehensive scanning methods (ARP, nmap, mDNS)
Mobile agent supports both iOS (Pythonista) and Android (Termux)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_scanner_mobile_features.py - Created comprehensive test suite for scanner/mobile features
seed_data_creation: Test devices created via scanner report endpoint during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Network Scanner and Mobile Agent features fully working. Scanner report endpoint is public (no auth) to allow LAN scanners to report devices. 17 devices discovered including Windows, Linux, iOS, Android, and IoT types. Setup Scanner tab shows comprehensive instructions for downloading and running the network scanner and mobile agents. All agent download endpoints working correctly.
